# Vertex AI Documentation

## Main Heading
**Vertex AI** - A machine learning platform enabling training, deployment of ML models and AI applications, combining data engineering, science, and ML engineering workflows.

## Primary Features & Services

### Generative AI Solutions
- **Gemini**: Google's multimodal generative AI model, to process images, videos, and text
- **Generative AI**: Access to Google's generative models for testing, tuning, and deployment
- **Model Garden**: Discovery and deployment platform for proprietary and open-source generative AI models

### Training Capabilities
- **AutoML Tabular**: Automated training for tabular data
- **AutoML Image**: Classification and object detection
- **Vertex AI Training**: Serverless custom training with persistent resources
- **Training Clusters**: Slurm-based cluster management
- **Ray on Vertex AI**: Distributed training framework
- **Neural Architecture Search**: Automated architecture optimization

### MLOps & Workflow Management
- **Vertex AI Pipelines**: ML workflow orchestration
- **Model Registry**: Version control and model management
- **Feature Store**: ML feature management and serving
- **Experiments**: Model iteration and comparison
- **TensorBoard**: Training visualization and profiling

### Deployment & Inference
- **Vertex AI Inference**: Online and batch prediction serving
- **Vector Search 2.0**: Intelligent retrieval for AI applications
- **Endpoints**: Public, private, and dedicated deployment options
- **Model Monitoring**: Performance tracking and drift detection

### Developer Tools
- **Colab Enterprise**: Cloud-based notebook environment
- **Vertex AI Workbench**: Managed and user-managed notebook instances
- **Deep Learning Containers**: Pre-configured training environments
- **Deep Learning VM Images**: GPU-optimized virtual machines

## Supporting Services

### Data Management
- Cloud Datasets
- BigQuery integration
- Cloud Storage integration
- Data labeling and annotation

### Evaluation & Analysis
- **Explainable AI**: Feature attribution and model interpretability
- **Model Evaluation**: Performance metrics and fairness assessment
- **ML Metadata**: Experiment tracking and lineage

### Specialized AI Solutions
**Vision & Document**: Vision AI, Document AI, OCR services
**Language**: Translation API, Natural Language API
**Search**: Enterprise Knowledge Graph, Retail Search, Vector Search
**Conversation**: Dialogflow, Agent Assist, Speech-to-Text
**Healthcare**: Healthcare API, NLP services
**Finance**: Anti-Money Laundering AI
**Contact Center**: Cloud Contact Center solutions

## Key Technologies & Frameworks Supported
- PyTorch and TensorFlow/Keras
- NVIDIA Triton inference
- Cloud TPUs
- Spot and Flex-start VMs
- Private Service Connect (PSC)

## Regional & Governance Features
- Multi-region deployment
- VPC Service Controls
- Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK)
- Organization policy constraints

**Last Updated**: February 5, 2026
